speaker: Vivian
instruction: 自然、明亮、轻快，像在做干净利落的技术分享。

speaker: Serena
text: 今天是一个阳光明媚的一天。
instruction: 温柔、亲切、自然，像在轻声讲述一段温暖的开场。

speaker: Uncle_Fu
text: 今天是一个阳光明媚的一天。
instruction: 沉稳、宽厚、松弛，像一位有经验的长者在安抚听众。

speaker: Dylan
description: 年轻、偏北京口音的中文男声
instruction: 年轻、自信、带一点北京口语感，表达干脆利落。

speaker: Eric
description: 活泼、偏成都口音的中文男声
instruction: 轻松、活泼、带一点西南口语气质，听感松弛自然。

speaker: Ryan
description: 有节奏感、动感较强的英文男声
text: Today feels bright and full of energy.
instruction: Energetic, rhythmic, and confident, like a modern product launch intro.

speaker: Aiden
description: 阳光、开朗的美式英文男声
text: What a bright and lovely day.
instruction: Sunny, friendly, and upbeat, like greeting listeners on a beautiful morning.

speaker: Ono_Anna
text: 今日は気持ちのいい朝です。
instruction: Playful, bright, and cute, with a lively anime-like warmth.

speaker: Sohee
instruction: Warm, gentle, and calm, like a soft spoken radio host.
